_description: Maps XML connector keys to UX abbreviations for Loxone function block types

_sources.ux: Validated via Loxone Config UX (Anschluss anzeigen popup + block labels)

WDot.desc: Text output for open windows / doors

S.desc: 1 = closed, 2 = tilted, 3 = open, 4 = closed and not locked,

AQ1-20.desc: Analog output of actuator/dimmer 1-20 on RGB - %-value red +

AQs.desc: Analogue Output - Value indicating currently active scene

AQrm.desc: Analogue output for room service status 1 = Vacant/not clean

To.desc: Duration press and hold for 'All off'

MaxR.desc: Maximum precipitation in the next set hours

MaxRa.desc: Maximum rain duration in the last 24 hours

AQr.desc: Analogue output for the red LED

AQg.desc: Analogue output for the green LED

AQb.desc: Analogue output for the blue LED

AQs.desc: Analogue Output - Value indicating currently active scene

V.desc: Value (V1-4), depending on time of input (Tr)

Vbu.desc: Loxone Music Server: Alarm clock volume

Nlo.desc: Name or number of last output

Tla.desc: Time and date of last authorization

Online.desc: Output is active as long as the target device is ping-able

Rtc.desc: Remaining duration of the active cycle

+0 to +23.desc: Relative Mode: Price in the hour now +0 to +23

AvgMax.desc: Maximum wind speed in the averaging period
